characters.appearance: A young woman in her late 20s or early 30s with a medium build and fair complexion. She has long, dark brown hair styled with soft waves, parted on the side. Her facial features include large, expressive dark eyes, well-defined eyebrows, and a friendly smile. She wears black-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: A light blue and white striped button-down shirt. She wears a silver ring with a pearl on her right ring finger and a green stone ring on her left ring finger.
characters.demeanor: Engaging, friendly, and articulate, maintaining direct eye contact with the camera and using hand gestures to emphasize points.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: a sense of discombobulation.
Unknown speaker says: discombobulation.
Unknown speaker says: I feel a little discombobulated.
Unknown speaker says: So discombobulated.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a complex, confusing English word.
- Shows multiple people struggling or using the word, creating curiosity.
- Sets up the premise of feeling lost or confused in English.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
A sense of Discombobulation
I feel a little Discombobulated
Discombobulated

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: सुनने में ये वर्ड कितना हैवी लगता है बट इसका मीनिंग बहुत आसान है। चलो सिंपल इंग्लिश में समझते हैं। [This word sounds so heavy, but its meaning is very easy. Let's understand it in simple English.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Presenter steps in as a friendly guide to demystify the complex word.
- Establishes a warm, practical, and approachable tone.
- Transitions from the hook to the educational payoff.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: तो आप discombobulated तब होते हो जब आपका दिमाग काम करना बंद कर देता है और आप बहुत ज्यादा confuse हो जाते हो। [So you get discombobulated when your mind stops working and you get very confused.]
Character A says: It simply means when you are confused, unsettled or mentally disorganized.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the educational value by explaining the word clearly in Hindi and English.
- Builds trust with the viewer by providing immediate, easy-to-understand knowledge.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Discombobulated
➡️ जब आपका दिमाग काम करना बंद करदे
➡️ बहुत ज्यादा confuse हो जाते हो
when you are confused, unsettled or mentally disorganized

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: इतने सारे लोगों के सामने बोलने पर वो बहुत ज्यादा confused हो गया। [He got very confused after speaking in front of so many people.]
Character A says: He got discombobulated after speaking in front of so many people.
Character A says: ऐसे अच्छे वर्ड्स याद तो कर लोगे बट अगर बोलने के लिए स्पीकिंग पार्टनर नहीं है तो हमेशा discombobulate फील करोगे। [You will remember such good words, but if you don't have a speaking partner to speak with, you will always feel discombobulated.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides a practical example of the word in a sentence.
- Pivots smoothly from vocabulary learning to the core problem: lack of a speaking partner.
- Agitates the user's pain point of knowing words but freezing up when speaking.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: He got discombobulated after speaking in front of so many people.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: तो इस प्रॉब्लम का सॉल्यूशन है Supernova। [So the solution to this problem is Supernova.]
Character A says: और इसका सबसे बेस्ट फीचर है आपका अपना पर्सनल AI ट्यूटर। [And its best feature is your own personal AI tutor.]
Character A says: आप कभी भी, कहीं भी प्रैक्टिस कर सकते हो because your AI tutor is available 24/7। [You can practice anytime, anywhere because your AI tutor is available 24/7.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the ultimate solution to the speaking partner problem.
- Highlights the 24/7 availability of the AI tutor.
- Shows the app interface to build credibility.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
Learn to Speak English with Supernova
Get a Personal AI tutor
Ask anything without fear of judgement
Speak in English on Any topic

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Supernova पर आपको मिलते हैं डेली लेसन्स और स्पीकिंग एक्सरसाइजेस, वो भी रियल लाइफ सिचुएशंस के लिए। [On Supernova you get daily lessons and speaking exercises, that too for real-life situations.]
Character A says: जैसे ऑफिस में बात करना, जॉब इंटरव्यूज, या कस्टमर और फ्रेंड्स के साथ कन्वर्सेशन। [Like talking in the office, job interviews, or conversations with customers and friends.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Showcases the practical, real-world application of the app's exercises.
- Lists relatable scenarios (office, interviews, friends) that resonate with the target audience's daily struggles.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
Real-Life Situations
Office Conversations
Job Interviews
Talk to Customers
Talk to Family & Friends

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: ये ऐप आपको बोलते टाइम ही इंस्टेंट फीडबैक देता है so you exactly know where and how to improve। [This app gives you instant feedback while speaking so you exactly know where and how to improve.]
Character A says: साथ ही आप अपनी प्रोग्रेस ट्रैक कर सकते हो, और बिना झिझक के अपने AI ट्यूटर के साथ इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस कर सकते हो। [Also, you can track your progress, and practice English with your AI tutor without hesitation.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights the instant feedback mechanism, proving the app actively corrects mistakes.
- Mentions progress tracking to show long-term value.
- Reinforces the judgment-free practice environment.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Instant Feedback & Corrections on Mistakes
Track Your Progress
Daily Goals
Practice with AI Tutor

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: सबसे अच्छी बात ये एक सेफ स्पेस है। यहां पे आपको कोई जज नहीं करता और गलती करना बिल्कुल अलाउड है। [The best thing is that this is a safe space. Here, no one judges you, and making mistakes is absolutely allowed.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a strong emotional reassurance to anxious learners.
- Emphasizes the 'safe space' and 'no judgment' philosophy of the brand.
- Acts as a warm, encouraging push before the final CTA.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: तो अगर आप भी कॉन्फिडेंस के साथ इंग्लिश बोलना चाहते हो with Supernova, कमेंट में 'app' लिखो एंड आई विल पर्सनली शेयर द लिंक इन योर DM's। [So if you also want to speak English with confidence with Supernova, write 'app' in the comments and I will personally share the link in your DMs.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear, actionable Call to Action (commenting for a link).
- Ties the final pitch back to the core desire: speaking English with confidence.
- Ends on a friendly, personal note.
